claimText: The Integrated Biodiversity Assessment Tool (IBAT) Alliance is a coalition comprising Birdlife International, Conservation International, IUCN, and UNEP-WCMC.
evidenceExcerpt: A coalition of four organizations: Birdlife International, Conservation International, The International Union of Conservation for Nature (IUCN), and The United Nations Environment Programme - World Conservation Monitoring Centre (UNEP-WCMC).
examUse: Statement-based question identifying the constituent organizations of the IBAT Alliance.
distractorHooks: Including WWF or Greenpeace as a founding member
Stating it is a UN-only initiative

claimText: The mission of the IBAT Alliance, founded in 2008, is to provide data, tools, and guidance to help organizations act on biodiversity-related risks.
evidenceExcerpt: Founded in 2008. Mission: To provide data, tools and guidance that help organisations act on biodiversity-related risks.
examUse: Statement-based question on the primary objective and founding year of IBAT.
distractorHooks: Stating its mission is to enforce international environmental laws
Claiming it provides direct financial funding for conservation projects
